notes: John Henry Gemeny II. Born March 25, 1791 in Massachusetts. Son of John 'Jemminy' Gemeny (1769-1804, lost at sea) and Naomi Tewksbury. Siblings: Elizabeth Tewksbury Gemeny (1794), Anthony Richard Gemeny (1800, born in PA). Father lost at sea c. 1804 — family legend: Naomi hid John II in a cupboard to keep him from sailing with his father. Every Gemeny descends from John II. Moved to Alexandria, VA. Part owner of grocery store/tavern on Lee Street. Married Matilda 'Milly' Figg on June 23, 1816 in Alexandria. Built 'Pleasant View' in Kinsale, Westmoreland County, VA. Nine children: Naomi (1817-1899), John III (1823-1897), Richard Henry (1825-1873), Virginia Cecilia (1827-1890), Andrew (1829-1882), Mary Elizabeth (1832-1891), Benjamin (1835-1895), Edgar John (1839-1924), Amelia (1841-1843, died young in Kinsale). Died February 8, 1850 in Alexandria at age 58.
